bank.retain_mission: Extract studio-operations decisions, capacity and staffing patterns, and cross-project coordination outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about studio cadence, ceremonies, capacity model, and recurring operational pain points. Ignore one-off scheduling.

mental_models.name: Capacity Model
mental_models.source_query: How does the studio model capacity and allocate teams? Cadence, ceremonies, and constraints.

mental_models.name: Operational Friction
mental_models.source_query: What operational friction recurs across projects, and which interventions have helped?
